prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历 年位次近两年在33000–34000区间窄幅波动、2026年物理类计划缩招6人（-4%）、学校软科排名持续上升、声誉偏正面但抖音热度一般、本省考生数基本持平等因素。在2025年基准34117名基础上，预测2026年最低位次约33334名，区间32834–33834名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 24744 → 27361 → 36288 → 33461 → 34117. Rankings continuously declined from 2021 to 2023 (dropping from 24744 to 36288), slightly recovered to 33461 in 2024, and slightly fell back to 34117 in 2025, fluctuating in the 33000–34000 range in recent two years, with a 2025 baseline of about 34117. Enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 145 → 149 → 152 → 151 → 151, with 151 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 145, a decrease of 6 from 2025, a reduction of about 4%, which tightens quotas and somewhat intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan Agricultural University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 162nd in 2021 to 134th in 2026, indicating improving comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (signaled by declining admission scores year by year), turning to slightly positive in 2023 (good cafeteria service, timely complaint handling). Douyin popularity ranks 86th overall, rated as 'average', with comprehensive popularity of about 225,000, moderate exposure. In 2022, abnormal admission signals were moderate concern (admission scores declining since 2018), but have stabilized in recent years. No significant negative public opinion impact. Animal Science is rated A, Crop Science rated A-, both traditional strengths. These directly correspond to majors like Animal Science, Agronomy, Plant Protection in the enrollment, offering some appeal to agriculture and forestry majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., remain highly popular recommendations. Sichuan Agricultural University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular majors like Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Electronics, helping maintain application heat. In 2026, the province's total number of Gaokao takers is about 200,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 143,600, roughly the same as 2025 (143,400), so competition scale is stable. Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Sichuan Province (not the home province), with enrollment in Liaoning accounting for about 8.5% (total 51 students in 2025), a cross-province enrollment, so regional preference factors have limited influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings in the 33000–34000 range in recent two years, the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan reduction of 6 students (-4%), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, slightly positive reputation but average Douyin popularity, and stable number of local examinees, based on the 2025 baseline of 34117, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 33334, with a range of 32834–33834.

Candidates with rankings above the lower bound (32834) can focus on Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Electronics); those in the middle range can target Tier 2 advantageous agriculture and forestry majors, Law, Food Science, etc.; those near the upper bound are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety. This university is a 211 agriculture and forestry institution, with Animal Science A and Crop Science A- as flagship disciplines, offering high cost-effectiveness in related majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 5446 → 4882 → 5166 → 4781 → 4616. Overall, there is a fluctuating forward trend. In 2021, 5446 was the highest in recent years (easiest to enter), and then it narrowed year by year to 4616 in 2025, the lowest in recent years (hardest to enter). Over the past 5 years, it has moved forward by about 830 places, with a baseline of about 4616 in 2025. The planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 36 → 32 → 28 → 29 → 29, with 29 in 2025. In 2026 (§ 7), the plan is 29, unchanged from 2025, indicating a stable plan with no changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 162nd in 2021 to 134th in 2026, showing a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (signal of declining admission scores year by year), turning to slightly positive in 2023 (good cafeteria service, timely complaint handling). Douyin popularity ranks 86th overall, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 225,000. In 2022, there was a medium attention abnormal signal for admission (admission scores declining since 2018), but it has stabilized in recent years. No significant negative public opinion impact. Animal Science is rated A, Crop Science is rated A-. Among the History Category enrollment majors, Law, Financial Management, and Business Administration belong to the economics, management, and law category, which are not highly related to Sichuan Agricultural University's advantageous agriculture and forestry disciplines, but the 211 platform still attracts liberal arts candidates. Law remains popular (advantageous for civil service exams), Chinese Language and Literature's recommendation popularity is rising, and accounting/finance categories are diverging with a wait-and-see attitude. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 200,000, with an estimated 56,400 in History Category, roughly the same as 2025 (56,300), indicating stable competition scale. 2026.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Sichuan Province (not the home province), with an enrollment share in Liaoning of about 8.5% (total enrollment of 51 in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The History Category plan is only 29 people, with a small enrollment scale, and regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings (about 830 places forward in the past 5 years), the unchanged History Category plan for 2026 compared to 2025, the steady rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, a slightly positive reputation but average Douyin popularity, and the basically stable number of candidates in the province, combined with the rising school ranking and sustained popularity of liberal arts hot majors, competition is expected to intensify slightly. Based on the 2025 baseline of 4616, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 4631, with a range of 4131–5131.
